curation_notes: The vulnerability is in zlib's MiniZip contrib library, bundled by pyminizip. The patch commit (73331a6) adds length validation checks for filename, comment, and extra field parameters in zipOpenNewFileInZip4_64, ensuring they do not exceed the 16-bit (0xffff) limit of the zip format header fields. Only one source file was changed (contrib/minizip/zip.c), so the patch is not noisy. Location derived directly from the patch diff.
